prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2024年第8名，2025–2026年第9名，稳居全国前十；2026年声誉评价偏正面，食堂排名全国第一、招生透明度好；抖音热度较热 （总排名第22位），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；拥有光学工程A+、电气工程A+、机械工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A等17个A-及 以上学科，工科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心专业社会热度高热/高热推荐；本省物理类考生2025年2605 87人，2026年总考生521000人，按近年物理类占比约73%估算约38万人，考生数大幅增加约46%，竞争显著加剧，持续走高。 华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，在江苏招生占比稳定，无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5310、2026年扩招约6%、本省物 理类考生大幅增加约46%以及学校声誉偏正面等因素，扩招对位次的向下拉动不足以抵消考生激增和竞争加剧的向上推升作用，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低 位次约5553名，区间5053–6053名。

- 计算机科学与技术（图灵启明实验班/创新实验班）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3904 → 3626 → 3625 → 6604 → 5310. In 2024, due to adjustments in major group structure, the ranking significantly dropped to 6604, then rebounded to 5310 in 2025, showing considerable fluctuation in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 5310. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 201, 201, 199, 207, and 198 respectively. In 2026, the plan is 210, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, indicating limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the main ranking of Soft Science from 2021 to 2024, and 9th from 2025 to 2026, consistently among the top ten nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with the cafeteria ranked first nationally and good enrollment transparency. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 22nd overall), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. It has 17 A- and above disciplines including Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high/highly recommended social popularity. In 2025, there were 260,587 Physics Category candidates in the province, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is 521,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, it is estimated to be approximately 380,000, a significant increase of about 46%, leading to intensified competition and a continuous upward trend. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with a stable enrollment proportion in Jiangsu and no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5310, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6%, the significant increase of about 46% in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the relatively positive reputation of the university, the downward pull of enrollment expansion on ranking is insufficient to offset the upward push from the surge in candidates and intensified competition. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5553, with a range of 5053 to 6053.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science and Technology (Turing Qiming Experimental Class/Innovation Experimental Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Smart Energy Qiming Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Automation (Qiming Experimental Class/Innovation Experimental Class)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
- Software Engineering (AI Large Model Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Energy and Power
- Materials
- Physics
- Aerospace
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5053 to 6053, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 5000), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine and Computer Science. For rankings near the upper limit (around 6000), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and cautiously choose Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1249 → 1300 → 1507 → 1506 → 1928, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 680 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of approximately 1928 in 2025; the planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 38, 39, 43, 37, and 50 respectively, with a planned enrollment of 51 in 2026, a slight expansion of 2% compared to 2025, which is extremely small.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking from 2021 to 2024, and 9th from 2025 to 2026, firmly among the top ten nationally; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, with excellent cafeteria conditions and good enrollment transparency; relatively hot on Douyin (ranked 22nd overall), with relatively high overall attention; strong disciplines such as Journalism and Communication (A-) and Business Administration (A-) are related to liberal arts, but the enrollment majors for History Category are mainly humanities and social sciences, which have a low correlation with the university's strong engineering fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are relatively popular/recommended in society; in 2025, there were 97,088 History Category examinees in the province, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is 521,000, estimated at about 140,000 based on the recent proportion of History Category of about 27%, a significant increase of about 45% in examinee numbers, leading to intensified competition and a slight upward trend; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with a stable proportion of History Category enrollment in Jiangsu and no significant change in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the enrollment expansion of only 2% in 2026, the significant increase of about 45% in History Category examinees in the province, and the relatively weak advantage of liberal arts compared to engineering at the university, the upward push effect of the surge in examinees on rankings is far greater than the downward pull of the small enrollment expansion. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 1928; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1981, with a range of 1743 to 2219.
